SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-06-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-06-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CHRISTOPHER CHANDLER. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MATTHEW ABDALAH AND LAURA ABDALAH ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT BELONG HOME, INC. (CAROLINE I. LUGLI) IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT RPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABDALAH, MATTHEW ABDALAH, LAURA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BELONG HOME, INC. $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 03/27/2025. SC-130 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
